task_completion.description: Verify that the Northwind Traders business is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Manager.io interface should display 'Northwind Traders' at the top or in the active business view.

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the Customers module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Customers' tab should be highlighted in the left navigation menu, or the main screen should display the Customers list.

task_completion.description: Verify the customer Name and Code are entered correctly in the New Customer form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Blue River Technologies' should be visible in the 'Name' field, and 'BRT-001' should be visible in the 'Code' field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Credit Limit is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Credit limit' option should be enabled/checked, and the value '25000' should be visible in the corresponding amount field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Billing Address and Email are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '1847 Innovation Drive, Austin, TX 78701, United States' should be visible in the Billing Address field, and 'accounts@blueriver.tech' in the Email field.

task_completion.description: Verify the customer was successfully created and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Create' button is clicked, and/or the newly created customer 'Blue River Technologies' (BRT-001) is visible as an entry in the main Customers list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Manager.io web interface being clicked and typed into, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Manager.io application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application should look like the standard Manager.io accounting software, not a mock-up, text editor, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just paste the final expected output into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of form filling within the Manager.io 'New Customer' screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The customer must be created in the 'customers' module using the 'new' action. Expected details: Name = 'Blue River Technologies', Code = 'BRT-001', Credit Limit = 25000, Email = 'accounts@blueriver.tech', and Billing Address must contain 'Austin'.
